rationale: No essay was produced. The response consists entirely of the model's internal planning notes—analyzing the prompt, brainstorming setting and character, and beginning a section outline—but it never actually writes the essay. There is no personal narrative, no scenes, no reflection, no prose to evaluate. The task is fundamentally unmet.
